item.title: My younger sister wants to be an animator!
item.description: https://youtu.be/10_BniA6Z88?si=2Hu1CtKePiO8Y6Xr?t=58 Hi! I am the older sister of the creator, and I want to share her latest video! She was so surprised by the amount of love from imgur on her video last month that she wanted me to share her unending gratitude. If you decide to make the journey to youtube, let us know you're from imgur in the comments!

item.title: Dumb things I secretly laugh at (meme dump)
item.description:
1. Ear is tasty mmm
2
3. Oh, now it's ooon
4
5. But you have heard of him
6
7. Shout out to camera crane operators.
8. You there! Reading this! What's your type?
9
10. HJAHHAHAJAJHHAhahAHHAHAa
11
12
13
14. Took me a sec
15. What is your passion? Mine is along with posting on Imgur in my spare time (which is like 5-6 hours per night) I work on my passion project which is a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game. If you are a fan and this dump entertained you, chances are that you might like my game too. Please wishlist on Steam, it's a great way to support us, small dev teams: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I’m your dad now
item.description: I am Native American, I was raised at one point in a white community and at another point in an all black community. Growing up, I was too black for the white community to make friends as I was told and was too white to fit in with the black community. The Hispanic community did not welcome me because I didn’t speak Spanish. My brother was openly gay when it wasn’t culturally acceptable. I understand what it’s like to be a black sheep. If you feel like your family and community won’t accept you, I’m your dad now. I love you and am proud of you. Message me if you want to talk and need bad advice.
item.dc:creator: poorhandwriting

item.title: My Twentyninth Dump
item.description:
Notice how Harley's socks do that thing to the thighs? Anyway, that's bait, you're trapped, here are the memes.
So in the Twentyeighth Dump I complained about how a picture from the Twentyseventh Dump had been removed from public view for breaking imgur guidelines.
AND THEN the Twentyeighth Dump got auto-marked as mature.
Which is probably fine, there were quite a few words like whore, cum, and fuck in that, and I guess Imgur's algorithm is a real pearl-clutcher.
But the Twentyeighth Dump? After twentyseven other dumps full of questionable morality? All right, I guess...
ANYWAY LET'S GOOOOOOO!!!
Bet there are some frogs in this here dump...
... yeah, maybe this dump will be marked mature too...
Frogs!
Paige no
Frog!!
I ducking love corvids.
... I have no idea what this is about, but I think I just scared the tits off all the anatidaephobics out there.
... I really like IPA's though.
Can you imagine such a day that memes like this will no longer be relevant? Like, this one is from November 15th 2023, and the shitshow persists.
Maybe it's my cursing that's getting my posts flagged. Oh duck.
The struggle is real.
Wonk wonk.
I. Want. This. So. Bad.
Oops, Israel-Palestine meme. Now I'm definitely getting flagged.
Italian Elon Musk is still one of the funniest things that's happened in recent years.
This was me last December.
Catstronaut? Astromeowt? Goose?
See y'all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: Kateness

item.title: Sensible Chuckle
item.dc:creator: buttnakedunderwear

item.title: An abuser’s guilt is not their victim’s burden to bear
item.description:
TLDR is pretty much in this meme. . I’m putting myself out there in a vulnerable way by posting this. I’m honestly kinda shaking, but I think this is still something that needs to be said. I’ve been seeing too many posts and comments on the internet of people who were abused by someone with an undiagnosed mental illness. The abuser then gets a diagnosis, gets treatment, and improves, and the family and friends of the abuser are now twisting their victim’s arm into forgiving them because “they were mentally ill!” Some folks even have the gall to say that their victim’s forgiveness is essential to the abuser’s recovery process. This is not okay. You don’t have to forgive your abuser just because they’re mentally ill and now on the mend. I’m talking from the perspective of a mentally ill abuser.
I was not always a good person. It wasn’t intentional. I had A LOT of mental health problems, which included growing up in a severely fractured home life. My parents loved me, but they weren’t good parents. Cluster b personality disorders run on both sides of my biological family tree. There are both sociopaths and narcissists in both my mother and father’s family. Despite being fraternal twins (meaning not identical), my brother and I somehow managed to both get bipolar 1 and autism spectrum disorder in the womb. So basically, I imitated what I saw at home, lashed out in response to what I ENDURED at home, and would spiral into fits of madness that I didn’t understand due to undiagnosed mental illnesses. I did TERRIBLE things during my manic episodes. I did terrible things as an emotionally traumatized child. I was volatile, verbally abusive, and extremely psychologically abusive. One person told me “You’re a mind terrorist.” The things I did were absolutely awful. I don’t even want to talk about it because I’m so ashamed. There are a few victims that I BADLY wish I could apologize to, and get forgiveness from. I even dream about getting their forgiveness. These victims have made it abundantly clear by both saying it and blocking me everywhere that they have no desire to hear from me ever again. AND THAT’S TOTALLY OKAY!
Here’s the thing: My remorse and desire to be better does not entitle me to my victims’ forgiveness. Some apologies are only perceived as harassment, and it would be abusing my victims all over again by forcing them to endure my presence that I am imposing onto them. Like this meme says, there are people that will only ever see me as an antagonizer in their story, and that is 1000% valid. If my treatment was dependent on their forgiveness, then I would be putting my obligation to get better on them. This applies to EVERYONE.
You don’t owe your abuser forgiveness. If they’re trying to put you in a corner by saying that your forgiveness is essential to their treatment, don’t budge. Feel free to quote me directly on this: If they can’t continue to stay stable regardless of your disposition to it, then they’re still putting the responsibility of their problems onto other people. In fact, here’s a meme with this quote to send to someone putting you in that position.
Feel free to send this to the person pestering you to “try to make it right.”
There’s the extra bitchy version if they’re still not getting the hint. I’m sure some folks might complain that I’m not showing enough compassion to the other side by talking a hard stance like this, but I’m actually on the reformed abuser’s side as well: I’m not enabling their giving up just because they didn’t get to alleviate their guilt.
Not that my blessing matters, but now you’ve heard it from someone on the other side that you’re doing nothing wrong. Guilt is OUR burden to bear, not our victim’s.
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: A1C is hard for me
item.description: So I recently switched to the Medtronic 780g system because I used to have omnipod and it was too expensive. Thankfully the new system also come with it's own cgm system (continuous glucose monitor) and the pump can then take the info from that and make predictions etc to help make sure my bg stays in range. It does take some work to get the setting just right for you but i found what works for me and my doctor will most likely be very happy because I've had an A1C of about 15ish since i was 6 (diagnosed at age 4). So for me this is a major breakthrough if I can keep it going.
item.dc:creator: jmoore1500

item.title: It feels different
item.description: Before you upvote my success, I've been smoking on and off for over 30 years. I've quit many times. Even after defeating cancer I went back to smoking. This time feels different though. I don't miss it in the same way. It's a tough habit to quit, I wish you all luck overcoming this stupid addiction.

item.title: Eclipse was minor compared to death of Peter Higgs, who started the greatest particle hunt of the past 60 years.
